bottomQuartileNotes: Largest remaining gaps: components/CodeViewer, FileExplorer, AiChat/index, hooks/useAtls, services/orchestrator/swarmChat/subagentService, stores/terminalStore. Run `npm run test:coverage:check-100` for the file list; see CONTRIBUTING-TESTS.md for merge order.
ciThresholds: vite.config.ts coverage.thresholds ratcheted with this baseline. When `test:coverage:check-100:fail` passes, raise thresholds toward 100 (branches last) and enable the strict CI step.
